source: .specs/agent-scenarios.md → Feature: Synchronous slash command (no LLM call)
notes: OpenCode synchronous no-LLM slash command (/help). OpenCode's Source is ProcessOwnedStore (SQLite, core/adapters/inbound/agents/opencode/agent.go): a transient proc-<PID> pre-session is born ready at launch, then a SQLite-keyed ses_… session appears in ready and runs one warm-up turn (ready->working->ready). The warm-up turn is needed so the store row exists for resolve_transcript to bind. After warm_turn_end returns to ready, the slash_window phase pins the ses_… session ready with duration_at_least_ms:4000 and invariants forbidding state_transition to working/waiting — those are what would fire if the local slash (incorrectly) drove a model call. /help is a no-LLM LOCAL command: the watcher's scanParts (core/adapters/inbound/agents/opencode/watcher.go) is part-driven and emits EventActivity only when a NEW part row lands; /help writes ZERO new parts, so no activity event fires and the session stays ready (the read-from-store no-op). RECORDABLE via the live-TUI path: PR #495 added run_live() to drive-opencode-interactive.sh, which routes any recipe carrying a `slash` step to the held-open opencode TUI under tmux and delivers the slash with tmux send-keys -l (NOT headless `opencode run`, which stores a slash command as literal prompt text and runs a model turn — confirmed 2026-05-26 — inverting this scenario). The `slash` step carries no EXPECTED_TURNS bump and the recipe issues no wait_turn after it, so it avoids the run_live() turn-detection race. Sibling opencode session-reset records via the same live-TUI path.

text: Pre-session row (proc-<PID>) appears in ready within 2s of opencode launch
Warm-up prompt drives ready -> working on the SQLite-keyed ses_… session (materializes the store row so subsequent steps can resolve_transcript)
Warm-up turn completes back to ready (same ses_… session id)
Spec: state stays ready throughout the no-LLM slash command — no working transition driven by the synchronous local slash (the store row gains no new assistant turn)
